name: Cranberry Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, sift together the flour, 1/4 cup sugar, baking soda, and salt.
2. In a small bowl, combine the beaten egg, buttermilk, and vegetable oil; blend well.
3. Add the egg mixture to the dry ingredients and stir until just moistened.
4. Fold in the chopped cranberries and additional 1/2 cup sugar.
5. Fill greased 2 1/2-inch muffin cups about 2/3 full with batter.
6. Bake at 400 degrees F (200 degrees C) for 20 minutes or until golden brown.
7. Serve hot with butter and homemade jelly or jam.
